findingDetails.title: STUDY lacks an enforceable pre-prompt injection gate
findingDetails.description: The STUDY plan names an injection envelope but defines no prompt-injection sanitization, delimiter, refusal, or adversarial acceptance gate.
findingDetails.impact: Hostile corpus instructions can influence generated structure or behavior without triggering source-value/span leak checks.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add a fail-closed pre-prompt isolation contract and adversarial fixtures before buildWritePrompt integration.
findingDetails.scopeProof: All phase 004-010 planning artifacts were searched for concrete prompt-injection controls; only phase 006 names injection and lacks behavior-level gates.

noveltyJustification: One new cross-consumer security contract gap; rights, cache, and authority-order paths were ruled out as contradictory.

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Corpus hydration crosses a model prompt and external transport boundaries

targetSelection.selectionReason: These are the producer-consumer security boundaries for corpus-derived content

searchLedger.hypothesis: Hydrated corpus instructions may cross into the model prompt without a defined neutralization gate

searchActions.queryOrPath: hydrate -> transform -> buildWritePrompt -> runGuided
searchActions.result: envelope named; no hostile-instruction behavior or fixture defined

searchLedger.rationale: The output leak gate cannot substitute for pre-prompt instruction isolation

searchLedger.invariant: Unknown-rights content cannot authorize exact reuse

searchActions.queryOrPath: unknown-rights|exact reuse|rights
searchActions.result: authority restrictions agree

searchLedger.ruledOutReason: All consumers keep unknown-rights evidence non-authoritative

searchLedger.invariant: Raw corpus and Open Design payloads are never cached

searchActions.queryOrPath: phase 010 plan and checklist
searchActions.result: metadata-only no-cache gate is explicit

searchLedger.rationale: No cache-authority gap in the plan
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Offline and live no-cache gates are both required

searchLedger.invariant: Corpus and transport remain below brief, mode judgment, and target evidence

searchActions.queryOrPath: authority decisions
searchActions.result: fixed order is consistent

searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Each consumer states explicit subordinate behavior

findingDetails.title: Verification Summary totals undercount checklist obligations
findingDetails.description: Six of seven implementation checklists publish verification-summary totals that do not equal their actual P0/P1/P2 checklist rows.
findingDetails.impact: Operators can satisfy advertised denominators while leaving blocker or required rows unchecked.
findingDetails.recommendation: Mechanically derive or validate summary totals and correct all drifted checklists.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact priority-row counts covered all seven implementation checklists; phase 005 was the matching control.

findingDetails.title: STUDY lacks an enforceable pre-prompt injection gate
findingDetails.description: Upstream research requires embedded prompt-injection fixtures, but phase 006 has no corresponding behavior-level task or gate.
findingDetails.impact: The implementation plan can complete without the upstream prompt-boundary safety case.
findingDetails.recommendation: Carry the research fixture requirement into phase 006 acceptance criteria and tests.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared upstream Phase B safety matrix with phase 006 spec, plan, tasks, and checklist.

results.summary: Research recommendations map to child packets except the phase-006 prompt-injection fixture contract.
All checked research task claims carry substantive evidence; planned implementation rows are unchecked.
No packet-local feature catalog claims implementation delivery.
No packet-local playbook claims executable capability.

noveltyJustification: One new matrix/evidence defect plus a material research-to-plan refinement of F002.

findingDetails.title: Resume continuity points back to completed research
findingDetails.description: Resume continuity still directs the operator to run phase 001 even though phases 001-003 are complete.
findingDetails.evidence: The parent and research-child continuity blocks identify completed research as the next action while phase 004 is the current frontier.
findingDetails.recommendation: Route continuity to phase 004 and preserve phases 001-003 as completed predecessors.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Parent and all three completed research-child continuity blocks were compared with parent phase status and ordering.

findingDetails.title: STUDY lacks an enforceable pre-prompt injection gate
findingDetails.description: The STUDY plan names an injection envelope but does not define a pre-prompt rejection or neutralization gate with adversarial fixtures.
findingDetails.evidence: Phase-002 research requires embedded prompt-injection fixtures, while phase 006 covers authored-draft leakage but not hostile corpus instructions before prompt assembly.
findingDetails.recommendation: Specify the pre-prompt injection gate and adversarial fixtures before STUDY implementation.
findingDetails.scopeProof: All phase 004-010 planning artifacts were searched for concrete prompt-injection controls.

findingDetails.title: Verification Summary totals undercount checklist obligations
findingDetails.description: Six of seven implementation checklists publish verification-summary totals that do not equal their actual P0/P1/P2 checklist rows.
findingDetails.evidence: Exact priority-row counts disagree with summaries in phases 004 and 006-010; phase 005 is the matching control.
findingDetails.recommendation: Derive or mechanically validate every summary denominator from live checklist rows.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact priority-row counts covered all seven implementation checklists.

findingDetails.title: Phase 004 documents retain orphan transport tags
findingDetails.description: All six phase-004 canonical documents end with unmatched </content>, and spec.md also ends with unmatched </invoke>.
findingDetails.evidence: Packet-wide exact search found seven closing transport tags, all in phase 004, with no corresponding opening tags.
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove the orphan tags and validate canonical documents for malformed wrapper residue.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact malformed-tag searches covered every Markdown file under the phase parent and localized all matches to phase 004.

findingDetails.title: Phase 004 handoff truncates the task queue at T028
findingDetails.description: The handoff summary bounds implementation at T001-T028 although tasks.md defines governance tasks T029-T030.
findingDetails.evidence: The only bounded task range in the summary omits the task that maps modules to ADR authorities and the task that promotes validated ADRs.
findingDetails.recommendation: Use T001-T030 or defer task bounds entirely to tasks.md.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact task-id search compared the summary's bounded range against every phase-004 task definition.

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: The phase-parent contains ten child packets and maintainability affects future implementation handoffs.

targetSelection.selectionReason: Exact packet-wide searches localized maintainability anomalies to phase 004, whose six canonical documents were then read directly.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Canonical packet documents retain malformed transport residue.

searchActions.result: Seven orphan closing tags found, all in phase 004.

searchActions.result: The summary says T001-T028 while tasks.md defines T029-T030.

findingDetails.title: Resume continuity points back to completed research
findingDetails.description: Resume continuity still directs the operator to completed research instead of the phase-004 frontier.
findingDetails.evidence: Parent next_safe_action still says run child 001; research-child specs 002-003 retain pre-research dispatch state while summaries report completion.
findingDetails.recommendation: Route continuity to phase 004 and reconcile completed research-child metadata.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Stabilization replay compared parent and child continuity fields against completion summaries and the phase map.

findingDetails.title: STUDY lacks an enforceable pre-prompt injection gate
findingDetails.description: The STUDY plan does not reject or neutralize hostile corpus instructions before prompt assembly.
findingDetails.evidence: Upstream research requires embedded prompt-injection coverage; phase 006 defines an envelope and authored-output leak tests but no pre-prompt hostile-instruction fixture.
findingDetails.recommendation: Specify the pre-prompt injection gate and adversarial fixtures before STUDY implementation.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Stabilization replay searched every phase-006 canonical document for hostile-instruction controls and checked the upstream safety matrix.

findingDetails.title: Verification Summary totals undercount checklist obligations
findingDetails.description: Six implementation checklists publish summary totals that disagree with live priority-tagged rows.
findingDetails.evidence: Fresh exact counts over every implementation checklist reproduce the denominator mismatches and the phase-005 control match.
findingDetails.recommendation: Derive or mechanically validate every summary denominator from live checklist rows.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Stabilization replay recounted P0, P1, and P2 rows in all seven implementation checklists.

findingDetails.title: Phase 004 documents retain orphan transport tags
findingDetails.description: Seven unmatched closing transport tags remain in phase 004 canonical documents.
findingDetails.evidence: Fresh packet-wide exact search reproduces the seven phase-004 matches and finds no adjacent implementation-phase variant.
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove the orphan tags and validate canonical documents for malformed wrapper residue.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Stabilization replay searched every Markdown file under the phase parent for opening and closing content/invoke wrappers.

findingDetails.title: Phase 004 handoff truncates the task queue at T028
findingDetails.description: The handoff summary bounds work at T028 while the authoritative task queue ends at T030.
findingDetails.evidence: Fresh bounded-range search reproduces the mismatch and finds no second canonical target occurrence.
findingDetails.recommendation: Use T001-T030 or defer task bounds entirely to tasks.md.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Stabilization replay compared bounded task ranges with all task definitions across the target packet.

results.summary: Phase handoffs align except the unresolved STUDY prompt-injection fixture contract.
Every checked research claim resolves and planned implementation rows remain unchecked.
